h1. Operations, Monitoring, and Reindexing

h2. Purpose

Provide operational controls for indexing, graph sync, search quality, and troubleshooting.

h2. Operational Capabilities

* Indexing status dashboard
* Failed indexing queue
* Retry handling
* Reindex one asset
* Reindex by entity type
* Rebuild graph projection
* Count reconciliation
* Search quality dashboard
* Cost and latency monitoring
* Runbooks

h2. Requirements

|| ID || Requirement || Priority ||
| OPS-001 | Track indexing status | P0 |
| OPS-002 | Track vector sync status | P0 |
| OPS-003 | Track graph sync status | P1 |
| OPS-004 | Provide failed record view | P1 |
| OPS-005 | Reindex by JRN | P1 |
| OPS-006 | Reindex by entity type | P1 |
| OPS-007 | Reconcile source/vector/graph counts | P1 |
| OPS-008 | Create runbooks | P1 |
| OPS-009 | Monitor cost and latency | P1 |

h2. Success Criteria

* Operators can see what was indexed.
* Failed records are visible with reason.
* One asset can be reindexed by JRN.
* Entity type can be reindexed in batch.
* MongoDB, vector index, and Neo4j counts can be reconciled.

h2. Operational Dashboards

|| Dashboard || Purpose ||
| Indexing Status | Shows progress by entity type and source system |
| Failed Records | Shows failed items, error reason, retry count |
| Vector Sync | Shows chunk and embedding counts |
| Graph Sync | Shows node and edge counts |
| Search Quality | Shows golden question pass/fail results |
| Latency/Cost | Shows embedding, search, graph query, and LLM costs/latency |

h2. Runbooks

* Reindex by JRN
* Reindex by entity type
* Retry failed embedding jobs
* Rebuild Neo4j graph projection
* Troubleshoot bad semantic search result
* Troubleshoot missing lineage result
* Investigate unauthorized search result
